source.name: Complete Necromancer
source.author: Michael Holik, Matthew Pennell, Alexander Binns
source.description:
The dead rise, the dead walk. The dead reckon, the dead talk.
Embrace the dark side of magic with the Complete Necromancer! This class brings compelling (and balanced) minionmancy to your table and places the power of an undead horde at your fingertips.
